since_last: 37% of 100 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.87%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 37% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.57% · BTC -0.87% · Gold +0.47% · Nasdaq100 -1.18%. 37% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.87%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.87%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -2.48%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -11.54%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +3.57%, PANW +3.29%, ZS +3.05%, LEU +2.73%, CSCO +2.52%. Laggards: ISRG -11.54%, UPST -5.28%, META -4.63%, AMAT -4.52%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.06% at $125.79
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.06% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
